title: Ground every claim in a retrieved passage
description: Each factual statement in the answer must trace to a specific retrieved passage; unsupported claims are removed or abstained on.
body: Use when generating an answer from retrieved context. Do not let the model add facts beyond the passages, and avoid presenting plausible-sounding statements with no source. Actions: require the generation to cite the passage backing each claim, verify the cited passage actually supports it, and drop or abstain on claims with no support. Validation signals include a test that an answer claim not present in any retrieved passage is flagged as ungrounded. Risk boundary: an answer that asserts facts with no retrieved support is a hallucination; abstain or escalate rather than emit it.
